brand.name: Nexora Resorts
brand.tone: Professional, Luxury, Command-Center Polish, Sober, Cinematic
brand.archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) for marketing combined with Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast) for dashboard

rules.hero_heading: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-white

layout_and_spacing.marketing_page: Generous spacing. Use p-12 to p-24. High-contrast negative space. Center-aligned hero only, left-aligned content for everything else.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_shell: Strict bento/grid layout. Sidebar navigation. Use gap-4 or gap-6. Dense and functional.
layout_and_spacing.hero_overlay: MANDATORY bg-black/40 to bg-black/60 gradient overlay over the Caribbean resort image. Do not use opaque backgrounds for hero.

buttons.discord_cta: Medium size. bg-gradient-to-r from-[#5865F2] to-[#454FBF] text-white hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-50 dark:text-zinc-900 rounded-md

cards.dashboard: Flat solid backgrounds (e.g. bg-zinc-900 in dark mode), 1px solid border (border-zinc-800). No heavy drop shadows. Rounded corners (rounded-lg).

navigation.marketing_header: Crystal Glass. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border-b border-white/10. Sticky at top.
navigation.dashboard_sidebar: Solid dark background (bg-zinc-950), subtle right border (border-zinc-800). Nav links have hover states with lighter gray background.

interactions_and_animations.hover: All interactive elements MUST have distinct hover states.
interactions_and_animations.transitions: Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1).
interactions_and_animations.accessibility: Focus states required. Use ring-2 ring-white/50 for dark mode focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings. Use Playfair Display for marketing headings and Outfit for UI/Dashboard.
Ensure the hero background image is clearly visible but has a dark gradient overlay (bg-black/50) so the Nexora logo and 'Sign in with Discord' button pop.
Implement a theme toggle supporting 'dark' (default), 'light', and 'blurple' modes.

For the dashboard shell, use a clean sidebar navigation with the following links: Bookings, Player Search, Events, Sessions, Schedule, Ranking, Authorities, Forum, Hosting, Settings. Protect these behind a mock Discord auth.
Bookings page should list room types using the provided booking images. Include a gamepass check UI and a 'Book Now' button that simulates a Discord bot confirmation.
Avoid standard 'gamer' or 'Roblox' aesthetics. The UI must feel like a premium Four Seasons resort combined with a high-end developer tool.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='discord-login-btn').
DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. Use only the URLs provided in the media section.
Write components in pure HTML/Tailwind or customized Shadcn components for complex UI (tables, dropdowns). Build a custom Datepicker using Shadcn Calendar if needed.
